payload.title: Workspace + Project breadcrumb picker
payload.description:
Merge the workspace `<select>`, the workspace `+` button, and the project `<select>` into a single breadcrumb trigger:

  ◆ Scope › Scope CLI ▾

Clicking the trigger opens a 2-pane popover (Linear / Vercel style):
- Left pane: list of attached workspaces. Active workspace highlighted. At the bottom: "＋ Attach workspace…" (replaces the standalone `+` button).
- Right pane: projects in the hovered/selected workspace. Click a project to switch + close.

Notes:
- Replaces 3 bar controls with 1.
- The `›` separator communicates hierarchy and removes the second `▾`.
- Keyboard: arrow keys move within a pane, Tab moves between panes, Enter selects.
- State: persist last-opened pane between sessions? Probably not — always open to workspaces.

Touches: index.html (replace `#workspace-picker` + `#add-workspace` + `#project-picker` with a single `<button class="breadcrumb-trigger">`), app.js (bindBreadcrumb, popover), style.css (popover + breadcrumb chip).
